no: Patched: added English LANGUAGE line to tp2. Updated eet_cpmvars.tpa. Use lang:1 for English.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

in.t: Create ACBre/tra/english/ACStates.tra with exact English vanilla dialogue strings for Edwin (@99991-99993) and Imoen (@99990). Without this file, the mod crashes with STATE_WHICH_SAYS error on English games. Or use eet-mod-forge-patches #21.

sum: Joinable dwarf NPC mod with full storyline content spanning BG1, BG2, and EET.

co.no: KNOWN BUG: Missing English ACStates.tra — STATE_WHICH_SAYS fails on English installs. The mod author never provided English translations for dialogue state lookups (Edwin/Imoen vanilla text). Requires manual creation of tra/english/ACStates.tra with exact English game dialogue strings. German-language game installs work fine.

co.n: Change Breagar's dialog timer? (Default is 30 minutes between dialogues.) -> 45 minutes real time between talks
